name: Golden Nuggets with Plum Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Boneless chicken breast, cut into 1-1/4 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Eating Southern Style by Terry Thompson
Preparation Time: 1 hour
1. In a large bowl, combine buttermilk, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, soy sauce.
2. Meanwhile, prepare Plum Sauce (see below). Set bowl of sauce in center of pan.
3. Mix together paprika, dried basil leaves, oregano, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
4. Add garlic cloves to the spice mixture and blend well.
5. In another large bowl, add chicken cubes and mix with butter, shortening, bread crumbs, and sesame seeds until evenly coated.
6. Dip each chicken piece into the buttermilk mixture, then coat with the seasoned breadcrumb mixture.
7. Place coated chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake in preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through.
9. Plum Sauce: In a medium saucepan, combine plum jam, mustard, horseradish, and lemon juice. Cook over medium heat until heated through, stirring occasionally.
10. Serve hot nuggets with Plum Sauce on the side.
